---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature, enhancement, or layout styling change.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: ""
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. *"I am frustrated when trying to filter call logs..."*)

**Describe the Proposed Solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe Alternatives Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Visual mockups / Screenshots**
If applicable, attach designs or screen mockups showing where the feature should be added.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
